## C.L.E.A.R. Review Checklist
- [ ] **Correct** — behavior matches intent
- [ ] **Legible** — code reads clearly without context
- [ ] **Efficient** — no obvious waste or redundancy
- [ ] **Assessable** — tests cover happy path + key failure modes
- [ ] **Resilient** — edge cases and errors handled gracefully
